title: pseudognaphalium oligandrum
intro: Pseudognaphalium oligandrum, also known as rabbit brush or rabbit-tobacco, is a flowering plant native to western North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, as well as to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. Pseudognaphalium oligandrum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, salves, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal benefits.
